data.title: Best POS System for Retail Businesses (2026): Lightspeed Recognized for All-in-One Retail POS by Better Business Advice
data.description: In a recent report on March 26, 2026, retail businesses are shown to be embracing integrated technology for sales, inventory, and customer data management through a unified system. A piece by Better Business Advice specifically hails Lightspeed as a leading retail point of sale platform. This trend signifies a shift towards comprehensive tech solutions in the retail sector.

data.title: Conflux (CFX) reduces PoW mining rewards by 50% to 0.4 CFX/block starting April 7, benefitting CFX holders.
data.description: The Conflux (CFX) Network has decided to reduce PoW mining rewards by half, from 0.8 to 0.4 CFX per block. This adjustment will be implemented on April 7. This change has significant implications for CFX holders who will now receive lower rewards for mining activities.

data.title: Despite recent pullback, APT price at $1.03 with 4% decline. Forecast: Breakout to $1.15 by April 2026, with $0.99 support. Bullish MACD signals.
data.description: The stock of APT is currently trading at $1.03 following a decrease of 4%, yet technical analysis suggests a positive MACD momentum. Analysts predict that Aptos is likely to surpass the resistance level at $1.15, while the key support level remains strong at $0.99.

data.title: Crypto 'Works Like Casino' Unless You're An Insider, Says Analyst: 'Just Buy Bitcoin And Get On With Your Life'
data.description: According to cryptocurrency expert Willy Woo, trading in any cryptocurrency other than Bitcoin should be viewed as akin to gambling, unless one possesses insider knowledge that tips the odds in their favor. Woo emphasized that without a significant advantage in information or structure, investing in cryptocurrencies is not advisable as it operates similarly to a casino where the house typically wins. Woo distinguishes Bitcoin from other cryptocurrencies, asserting that they should not be grouped together simply as "crypto." The market performance of Bitcoin compared to alternative cryptocurrencies has led to disappointment for many investors, with Bitcoin outpacing its counterparts. Woo shared a cautionary tale related to the downfall of FTX, warning individuals about potential risks in the crypto market.

data.title: Philippines Aquaculture Market to Reach USD 0.58 Million by 2032, Driven by Rising Seaweed Production and Expanding Food Service Demand | MarkNtel Advisors
data.description: On March 26, 2026, a recent report by MarkNtel Advisors revealed that the Aquaculture Market in the Philippines is expected to experience a substantial growth, with a projected compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of approximately 5.53% between 2026 and 2032. This growth is mainly attributed to the rising demand for aquaculture products in the region.

data.title: A film studio relocated to Montana for tax incentives, aiming to generate hundreds of jobs in Missoula's film industry.
data.description: Last year, Story House established itself in Missoula with ambitious intentions to develop a movie and television campus. This initiative aimed to generate hundreds of employment opportunities and foster a vibrant filmmaking community in the area.

Analysts using technical analysis anticipate a potential surge past the resistance level of $0.18, potentially aiming for $0.19 in the upcoming weeks.

data.title: EDITED Launches New Manufacturer Intelligence Package
data.description: A new service called AI-powered Manufacturer Intelligence has been introduced by EDITED in New York and London. This service aims to assist apparel manufacturers in recognizing trends, discovering opportunities, and increasing their business success. By utilizing artificial intelligence technology, manufacturers will be able to enhance their market understanding and strategic decision-making processes. This launch signifies a significant step forward for the fashion industry, with EDITED providing innovative tools to aid manufacturers in staying competitive and thriving in the market.

data.title: Omdia: Global Cloud Infrastructure Spending Rose 29% in Q4 2025 as Hyperscalers Scaled AI Infrastructure Investment
data.description: In London, it was reported that global spending on cloud infrastructure services surged to US$110.9 billion in the fourth quarter of 2025, showcasing a notable 29% increase compared to the previous year. This growth marked the sixth consecutive quarter of expansion exceeding 20%, indicating a steady upward trend. The rise in demand for enterprise AI transitioning from experimental phases to full-scale deployment has prompted hyperscalers to ramp up investments in expanding AI infrastructure capacity. Moving into 2026, Omdia predicts a continued upward trajectory in this sector.

data.title: SyniFlow Brings Reservoirs to the Lab at cippe2026 with Breakthrough Microfluidic Technologies
data.description: An innovative laboratory solution presented by SyniFlow in Beijing at cippe2026 transforms intricate reservoir physics into direct visual data with pioneering technologies from SapphireLab.

data.title: Infobip Supports Thousands of Startups and Scaleups Through Startup Tribe Programme
data.description: In Vodnjan, Croatia, Infobip's Startup Tribe Programme has provided assistance to numerous startups and scaleups spanning across 120 countries in its initial five years. The initiative has supported thousands of these businesses during this time frame.

data.title: LTM Positioned as a Leader in ISG’s Provider Lens™ Evaluation for Oracle Cloud and Technology Ecosystem 2025
data.description: A company based in Mumbai, India, LTM, has recently been acknowledged as a top performer in various categories in the ISG Provider Lens™ Oracle Cloud and Technology Ecosystem 2025 reports. The reports highlighted LTM as a Leader across several quadrants. This recognition emphasizes LTM's expertise and success in the industry, showcasing their strong position and capabilities in the Oracle Cloud and Technology Ecosystem. This achievement signifies LTM's commitment to excellence and innovation in the field.
